python -c "
with open('src/server/index.ts', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Check if template literals are corrupted
if '[SDD] Server close timed out after ms' in content:
    print('Template literals were corrupted, fixing...')
    # Fix the corrupted parts
    content = content.replace('[SDD] Server close timed out after ms', '[SDD] Server close timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms')
    content = content.replace('[SDD] Stopping dashboard server on port ...', '[SDD] Stopping dashboard server on port ${port}...')
    content = content.replace('[SDD] Dashboard server stopped on port ', '[SDD] Dashboard server stopped on port ${port}')
    content = content.replace('Force resetting server state on port ', 'Force resetting server state on port ${port}')
    content = content.replace('Server state forcefully reset on port ', 'Server state forcefully reset on port ${port}')
    
    with open('src/server/index.ts', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write(content)
    print('Fixed!')
else:
    print('Template literals look OK')
"

python << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open('src/server/index.ts', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

# Find the stopDashboardServer function (line numbers are 0-indexed)
start_idx = None
end_idx = None
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if line.strip().startswith('export function stopDashboardServer():'):
        start_idx = i
    elif start_idx is not None and line.strip() == '}' and i > start_idx:
        end_idx = i
        break

print(f'Found stopDashboardServer at lines {start_idx+1} to {end_idx+1}')

new_func_lines = [
    "export function stopDashboardServer(): void {\n",
    "  if (!serverState) {\n",
    "    console.log('[SDD] Dashboard server already stopped');\n",
    "    return;\n",
    "  }\n",
    "\n",
    "  const port = serverState.port;\n",
    "  console.log(`[SDD] Stopping dashboard server on port ${port}...`);\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Close all WebSocket connections\n",
    "  serverState.clients.forEach(c => c.close());\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Close WebSocket server\n",
    "  serverState.wsServer.close();\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Close HTTP server with timeout fallback\n",
    "  let closed = false;\n",
    "  const closeCallback = () => {\n",
    "    if (!closed) {\n",
    "      closed = true;\n",
    "      console.log(`[SDD] Dashboard server stopped on port ${port}`);\n",
    "      serverState = null;\n",
    "    }\n",
    "  };\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Set timeout fallback for force cleanup\n",
    "  const timeoutMs = 5000;\n",
    "  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => {\n",
    "    if (!closed) {\n",
    "      console.warn(`[SDD] Server close timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms, forcing reset`);\n",
    "      resetServerState();\n",
    "    }\n",
    "  }, timeoutMs);\n",
    "\n",
    "  serverState.httpServer.close(closeCallback);\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "/**\n",
    " * Forcefully resets the server state.\n",
    " * Use this when normal shutdown fails or for immediate cleanup during restarts.\n",
    " */\n",
    "export function resetServerState(): void {\n",
    "  if (!serverState) {\n",
    "    console.log('[SDD] Server state already cleared');\n",
    "    return;\n",
    "  }\n",
    "\n",
    "  const port = serverState.port;\n",
    "  console.warn(`[SDD] Force resetting server state on port ${port}`);\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Close all WebSocket connections forcefully\n",
    "  serverState.clients.forEach(c => {\n",
    "    try { c.terminate(); } catch {}\n",
    "  });\n",
    "  serverState.clients.clear();\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Close servers without waiting for callbacks\n",
    "  try { serverState.wsServer.close(); } catch {}\n",
    "  try { serverState.httpServer.close(); } catch {}\n",
    "\n",
    "  // Immediately clear state\n",
    "  serverState = null;\n",
    "  console.log(`[SDD] Server state forcefully reset on port ${port}`);\n",
    "}\n",
]

# Replace the old function with new functions
new_lines = lines[:start_idx] + new_func_lines + lines[end_idx+1:]

with open('src/server/index.ts', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.writelines(new_lines)

print('Patch applied successfully!')
PYEOF

git commit -m "fix: improve dashboard server shutdown and restart reliability

- Add proper logging to stopDashboardServer()
- Implement timeout fallback (5s) for force cleanup
- Add resetServerState() function for recovery scenarios
- Prevent race conditions during MCP disconnect/reconnect cycles

Fixes issue where dashboard fails to start after MCP is toggled off/on"
git add .claude/settings.json && git commit -m "chore: update claude settings"
npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open('src/store/sqliteStore.ts', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find the section we need to replace by looking for key markers
start_marker = "// Load existing data from file if it exists"
end_marker = "existingDb.close();\n      }"

start_idx = content.find(start_marker)
if start_idx == -1:
    print("ERROR: Could not find start marker")
    exit(1)

# Find the end of this block (the closing brace after existingDb.close())
end_search_start = content.find(end_marker, start_idx)
if end_search_start == -1:
    print("ERROR: Could not find end marker")
    exit(1)

# Find the actual end of the block (after the closing brace)
old_block_end = end_search_start + len(end_marker)
old_text = content[start_idx:old_block_end]

print(f"Found old text at position {start_idx}, length {len(old_text)}")
print("Old text preview:")
print(repr(old_text[:200]))
PYEOF
if (Test-Path sdd.db) { Remove-Item sdd.db; Write-Host "Banco removido" } else { Write-Host "Nenhum banco encontrado" }

powershell -Command "$content = Get-Content 'src/store/sqliteStore.ts' -Raw; $pattern = '(\s+save\(\): void \{[^}]+\}\n\})'; $replacement = '$1`n`n  /**`n   * Reloads the database from disk.`n   * Closes the current database instance and reinitializes it,`n   * mimicking what happens in the constructor's initPromise.`n   */`n  async reload(): Promise<void> {`n    await this.ensureReady();`n`n    // Close and delete the current database instance`n    if (this.db) {`n      this.close();`n      this.db = null;`n    }`n`n    // Reinitialize from disk (mimic constructor's initPromise)`n    const initSqlJsFunc = await eval('import("sql.js")').then((m: any) => m.default);`n    const SQLModule = await initSqlJsFunc({`n      locateFile: (file: string) => {`n        // Return absolute path to WASM file inside sql.js package`n        return path.join(__dirname, '../../node_modules/sql.js/dist/', file);`n      }`n    }) as SqlJsModule;`n    this.db = new SQLModule.Database();`n`n    this.initTables();`n    this.migrate();`n`n    // Load existing data from file if it exists`n    try {`n      if (fs.existsSync(this.dbPath)) {`n        const fileBuffer = fs.readFileSync(this.dbPath);`n        const existingDb = new SQLModule.Database(fileBuffer.buffer.slice(fileBuffer.byteOffset, fileBuffer.byteOffset + fileBuffer.byteLength));`n`n        // Export all tables from existing DB and import to our DB`n        const tables = ['specs', 'plans', 'tasks', 'logs', 'criteria'];`n        for (const table of tables) {`n          try {`n            const rows = existingDb.exec(`SELECT * FROM ${table}`);`n            if (rows.length > 0 && rows[0].values.length > 0) {`n              const columns = rows[0].columns;`n              const values = rows[0].values;`n`n              // Insert each row`n              const placeholders = columns.map(() => '?').join(',');`n              const insertStmt = `INSERT OR REPLACE INTO ${table} (${columns.join(',')}) VALUES (${placeholders})`;`n              const stmt = this.db!.prepare(insertStmt);`n`n              for (const row of values) {`n                stmt.bind(row);`n                if (!stmt.step()) break;`n                stmt.free();`n              }`n            }`n          } catch (err) {`n            // Table may not exist in old database files - skip gracefully`n            continue;`n          }`n        }`n        existingDb.close();`n      }`n    } catch (err) {`n      // Failed to load existing data - start with empty database`n      console.warn('Failed to reload database:', err);`n    }`n  }`n}'; $newContent = $content -replace $pattern, $replacement; Set-Content 'src/store/sqliteStore.ts' -Value $newContent"
echo "--- Adding reload method to sqliteStore.ts ---"

powershell -Command "
$lines = Get-Content 'src/store/sqliteStore.ts'
$newLines = @()
$inserted = $false
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) {
    $newLines += $lines[$i]
    if (-not $inserted -and $lines[$i].Trim() -eq '}' -and $i -gt 0 -and $lines[$i-1] -match '\s+\}') {
        # Check if previous line is closing save() method
        for ($j = $i - 1; $j -ge 0; $j--) {
            if ($lines[$j] -match 'save\(\): void') {
                # Insert reload method here
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '  /**'
                $newLines += '   * Reloads the database from disk.'
                $newLines += '   * Closes the current database instance and reinitializes it,'
                $newLines += "   * mimicking what happens in the constructor's initPromise."
                $newLines += '   */'
                $newLines += '  async reload(): Promise<void> {'
                $newLines += '    await this.ensureReady();'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '    // Close and delete the current database instance'
                $newLines += '    if (this.db) {'
                $newLines += '      this.close();'
                $newLines += '      this.db = null;'
                $newLines += '    }'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += "    // Reinitialize from disk (mimic constructor's initPromise)"
                $newLines += "    const initSqlJsFunc = await eval('import(\"sql.js\")').then((m: any) => m.default);"
                $newLines += '    const SQLModule = await initSqlJsFunc({'
                $newLines += '      locateFile: (file: string) => {'
                $newLines += "        // Return absolute path to WASM file inside sql.js package"
                $newLines += "        return path.join(__dirname, '../../node_modules/sql.js/dist/', file);"
                $newLines += '      }'
                $newLines += '    }) as SqlJsModule;'
                $newLines += '    this.db = new SQLModule.Database();'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '    this.initTables();'
                $newLines += '    this.migrate();'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '    // Load existing data from file if it exists'
                $newLines += '    try {'
                $newLines += '      if (fs.existsSync(this.dbPath)) {'
                $newLines += '        const fileBuffer = fs.readFileSync(this.dbPath);'
                $newLines += '        const existingDb = new SQLModule.Database(fileBuffer.buffer.slice(fileBuffer.byteOffset, fileBuffer.byteOffset + fileBuffer.byteLength));'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '        // Export all tables from existing DB and import to our DB'
                $newLines += "        const tables = ['specs', 'plans', 'tasks', 'logs', 'criteria'];"
                $newLines += '        for (const table of tables) {'
                $newLines += '          try {'
                $newLines += '            const rows = existingDb.exec(\`SELECT * FROM ${table}\`);'
                $newLines += '            if (rows.length > 0 && rows[0].values.length > 0) {'
                $newLines += '              const columns = rows[0].columns;'
                $newLines += '              const values = rows[0].values;'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '              // Insert each row'
                $newLines += "              const placeholders = columns.map(() => '?').join(',');"
                $newLines += '              const insertStmt = \`INSERT OR REPLACE INTO ${table} (${columns.join(\',\')}) VALUES (${placeholders})\`;'
                $newLines += '              const stmt = this.db!.prepare(insertStmt);'
                $newLines += ''
                $newLines += '              for (const row of values) {'
                $newLines += '                stmt.bind(row);'
                $newLines += '                if (!stmt.step()) break;'
                $newLines += '                stmt.free();'
                $newLines += '              }'
                $newLines += '            }'
                $newLines += '          } catch (err) {'
                $newLines += '            // Table may not exist in old database files - skip gracefully'
                $newLines += '            continue;'
                $newLines += '          }'
                $newLines += '        }'
                $newLines += '        existingDb.close();'
                $newLines += '      }'
                $newLines += '    } catch (err) {'
                $newLines += "      // Failed to load existing data - start with empty database"
                $newLines += "      console.warn('Failed to reload database:', err);"
                $newLines += '    }'
                $newLines += '  }'
                $inserted = $true
                break
            }
            if ($lines[$j] -match '^\s*}') break
        }
    }
}
Set-Content 'src/store/sqliteStore.ts' -Value ($newLines -join "`r`n")
Write-Host 'Successfully added reload() method to sqliteStore.ts'
"
echo "Testing basic echo" > test.txt && cat test.txt

$lines = Get-Content "src\store\sqliteStore.ts"; $saveLine = 0; for($i=0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { if($lines[$i] -match '^\s*}\s*$' -and $i -gt 0 -and ($lines[$i+1] -match 'export const store')) { $saveLine = $i + 1; break } }; Write-Host "Class closes at line: $saveLine"; Write-Host "Content around it:"; for($j=$saveLine-5; $j -le $saveLine+3; $j++) { if($j -ge 0 -and $j -lt $lines.Count) { Write-Host "$($j+1): '$($lines[$j])'" } }

$original = Get-Content "src\store\sqliteStore.ts" -Raw; $methodToAdd = Get-Content "C:\temp\reload_method.txt" -Raw; $marker = '    }`n  }`n}`n`nexport const store'; if($original.Contains($marker)) { $newContent = $original.Replace($marker, "`n$methodToAdd`n}`n`nexport const store"); Set-Content "src\store\sqliteStore.ts" -Value $newContent -NoNewline; Write-Host "Success: reload() method inserted" } else { Write-Host "Error: marker not found" }

echo "  reload(): void {" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    if (!this.db || !fs.existsSync(this.dbPath)) return;" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM criteria');" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM logs');" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM tasks');" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM plans');" >> temp_reload.txt && echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM specs');" >> temp_reload.txt

echo "  reload(): void {" > temp_reload.txt; echo "    if (!this.db || !fs.existsSync(this.dbPath)) return;" >> temp_reload.txt; echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM criteria');" >> temp_reload.txt; echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM logs');" >> temp_reload.txt; echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM tasks');" >> temp_reload.txt; echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM plans');" >> temp_reload.txt; echo "    this.execStatement('DELETE FROM specs');" >> temp_reload.txt

node -e "import('./dist/store/sqliteStore.js').then(async m => { const s = m.store; await s.ensureReady?.() || true; console.log('Before reload - tasks:', s.listTasks().length); s.createTask('Test Task Reload'); console.log('After create - tasks:', s.listTasks().length); await s.reload(); console.log('After reload - tasks:', s.listTasks().length); s.close(); });"
